EarlySymptomsText.html.en: Most people know something's wrong with their companion before they know it's LP or even before they know there is such a thing as LP. This section asks questions about the early phase of your LP/GOLPP journey and how you came to believe {CmpnName} might have it.
EarlySymptomsText.html._source: Most people know something's wrong with their companion before they know it's LP or even before they know there is such a thing as LP. This section asks questions about the early phase of your LP/GOLPP journey and how you came to believe {CmpnName} might have it.
